strengths: ~15 years of broad software engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput micro-services
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic developer tooling at re:cinq
Track record of founding/maintaining an open-source platform (GISCollective) plus teaching, talks, and workshops
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML products, platforms, or research — AI experience appears recent and tooling-adjacent rather than core
Career level is Senior/Staff IC; no evidence of Principal/Director-level scope, strategy work, or advising strategic customers
No clear cloud-platform depth (no GCP/AWS/Azure architecture leadership signals beyond AWS CDK usage at Optilyz)

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise or shipped AI products
Missing Principal/Director-level strategy and influence track record
Broad, hands-on full-stack engineering experience with recent agentic/MCP work

response.justification: The candidate is a capable, versatile senior/staff engineer with long tenure and recent agentic-AI tooling exposure, but the role is a Director-level IC requiring recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products/platforms, and the gravitas to advise strategic customers on cloud and AI direction. The resume shows neither AI research credentials, shipped AI products at scale, nor prior Principal-level strategic influence, which are central to this role.
